summary: Missing Content-Security-Policy header on verified lab target
description: RedTeam Sentinel identified that the verified lab target does not return a Content-Security-Policy header. This finding was generated from passive header review only. No exploit payloads or intrusive tests were executed.
acceptanceCriteria: Content-Security-Policy is defined and reviewed by the application owner.
Policy is tested in report-only mode before enforcement.
Security reviewer validates the final header configuration.
Evidence of remediation is attached to the ticket.

complianceMapping.soc2: System operations / logical access control theme
